# Flossworks – Stitch & Track

> An offline-first Android app for cross-stitch. Turn your photos into stitchable
> patterns with real DMC thread colors, import existing chart PDFs, organize your
> projects, and track every stitch. Free to install; a one-time purchase unlocks
> creation/import/export — no subscription. Made by Flossworks Cross-Stitch LLC.

## What it does
- Create cross-stitch patterns from your own photos and images using real DMC thread colors.
- Import existing charts, including Pattern Keeper–style PDFs.
- Organize all your projects in one place.
- Track stitching progress: mark stitches, per-color counts, daily history, streaks, and finish estimates.
- Export print-ready PDFs and a single-file ".flossworks" backup.
- Works fully offline — no account, no sign-up; your data stays on your device.

## Who it's for
- Cross-stitch hobbyists on Android phones and tablets.
- Pattern sellers (an optional commercial/branding tier brands exported PDFs and listing images).

## Pricing
- Free to install. A one-time purchase unlocks pattern creation, import, and export. No subscription.

## Privacy
- Offline-first. The app collects no personal data and uploads nothing; everything stays on the device.

## Links
- Home: https://flossworkscross-stitch.com/
- Get it on Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.caybin.crossstitchstudio
- Privacy Policy: https://flossworkscross-stitch.com/privacy
- Support: https://flossworkscross-stitch.com/support
